description:
Features:

  • - This activity play center keeps cats entertained and active
  • - It includes scratching posts and a scratching board to protect furniture via distraction
  • - A soft, plush covering provides comfort for resting cats
  • - Particleboard and sisal
  • - A strong double base to prevent tipping
  • - The moon and star theme complements home decor
  • - Suitable for 1-2 cats under 11 lbs.
  • - Assembly required

Specification:

  • - Color: Beige, Dark Gray
  • - Materials: Particleboard, Plush, Sisal
  • - Overall Dimensions: 23.6" W x 15.7" D x 63" H
  • - Cat Bed: Dia. 12.2" x 3.1" H, Dia. 11.8" x 2.4" H (Inner)
  • - Cat Condo: 11.8" W x 15.7" D x 11.8" H
  • - Door Hole: 7.1" W x 9.1" H
  • - Moon-shape Round: Dia. 11.8" (Total), Dia. 7.1" (Inner)
  • - Platform: 7.9" W x 15.7" D (Second), 15.7" W x 15.7" D (Third, Fourth), 10.6" W x 9.4" D (Fifth)
  • - Post: Dia. 2.6"
  • - Scratching Board: 11" W x 10.6" H
  • - Hammock: 10.6" L x 10.6" W
  • - Base: 23.6" W x 15.7" D
  • - Maximum Load: 22 lbs.
  • - Item Label: D30-870V00BG

Package Includes:

  • - 1 x Cat Tree
  • - 1 x Manual
